top_signals.title: Trump’s Iran deal sparks anger among Republican hawks
top_signals.summary: The terms of the deal have alarmed some of the same Republicans who spent years denouncing former President Barack Obama's 2015 nuclear agreement with Iran as dangerously weak.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
